steps.t: Fredegar's admirers can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Fredegar's admirers in order to get a better understanding of this hob…
Fredegar Bolger can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Fredegar Bolger.

Hobbits upset and disgruntled for various reasons can be found in villages throughout Yondershire. Fredegar has asked you to collect signatures from u…
Fredegar Bolger can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should bring the list of signatures to Fredegar Bolger.
